offer: For insurance underwriters processing 10–20 claims/month, inaccurate coverage adjustments cause potential financial losses. We provide AI-driven recommendations instead of manual claim analysis and coverage adjustment processes.
problem: Inaccurate coverage adjustments leading to potential financial losses.
